title: Beyond The Stars
description: Beyond The Stars (BYTS) is an addon for Cosmic Horizons that reworks the solar system to give you 47 new planets to explore.
body: This Mod Will Add 47 New Worlds For You To Explore, Reworking The Solar System to Give You And Your Friends More Content To Play With. Adding 13 New Planets With Life And Tons Of Resorces To Expoit And Gather. Note: You will only be able to get modded ores on Earth.
